As someone deeply embedded in the realities of the Israeli-Palestinian conflict, he argues that recent developments, including the proposed death penalty law, are not isolated measures but symptoms of a broader shift toward exclusionary nationalism, legal inequality, and militarized thinking.

items.summary: Carys Garland is joined by Jan Onoszko, our correspondent from Rio, standing at a site where history is embedded in stone, a physical threshold through which nearly a million enslaved Africans were forced into Brazil over four decades. items.title: Artemis 2: What to know about first crewed Moon mission in half a century
items.summary: NASA's Artemis II mission will send four astronauts circling around the Moon in humanity's first crewed lunar mission since 1972 – and the first to feature a woman. Its main goal is to prepare for the return of boots on the Moon in 2028. Here's what to know about the highly anticipated mission.

items.title: Iraq secure final World Cup spot with win over Bolivia, join France group
items.summary: Iraq grabbed the last available place at the World Cup by beating Bolivia 2-1 in their intercontinental playoff on Tuesday, sealing their return to the finals ​after a ‌40-year absence. They will play in Group I against France, Senegal and Norway.

items.title: DR Congo score extra-time winner to reach first World Cup in half a century
items.summary: The Democratic Republic of Congo defeated Jamaica 1-0 after extra time in an intercontinental playoff on Tuesday to seal their first World Cup appearance in 52 years. Former England under-21 international Axel Tuanzebe scored following a corner kick in the 100th minute.

items.title: Italy’s World Cup nightmare deepens with shoot-out defeat to Bosnia
items.summary: Italy will miss a third straight World Cup after losing to Bosnia and Herzegovina in a qualification play-off final on Tuesday, falling 4-1 in a penalty shoot-out. Esmir Bajraktarevic scored the decisive spot-kick in Zenica, sending Bosnia into Group B and extending Italy’s qualifier misery.

items.title: Middle East live: Houthis claim missile attack on Israel as Trump says Iran war to end within weeks
items.summary: Yemen's Houthis on Wednesday claimed a missile attack against Israel they said was launched jointly with their backer Iran and Lebanon's Hezbollah – the third such attack since they entered the war. US President Donald Trump is set to make an address about the Iran war, a day after saying US military action in Iran could end "within ​two weeks, maybe three". Follow our liveblog for the latest.

items.title: Ukraine, nucléaire, réarmement : où est passé le pacifisme des Écologistes ?
items.summary: Loin de ses origines radicalement antimilitaristes, le parti écologiste français soutient désormais le « réarmement » français et européen. Un virage déjà opéré par les Verts allemands il y a plusieurs années. Itinéraire d’un changement de doctrine au nom du « réalisme politique ».

translation.title: Ukraine, nuclear, rearmament: where has the pacifism of the Greens gone?
translation.summary: Far from its radically anti-militarian origins, the French environmentalist party now supports French and European "rearmament". A turn already taken by the German Greens several years ago. Itinerary of a change of doctrine in the name of "political realism".

Les précisions de Serge Berberi, correspondant de France 24 à Beyrouth.

translation.title: Lebanon: Seven dead in new Israeli strikes, who wants to occupy the south after the war
translation.summary: The Lebanese authorities announced early Wednesday that further Israeli attacks had killed seven people in Beirut and its region, when Israel said it wanted to occupy part of southern Lebanon after the war had ended. The details of Serge Berberi, France 24 correspondent in Beirut.

items.title: Occupation du Liban-Sud par Israël: "Une nouvelle Nakba"
items.summary: A la Une de la presse, ce mercredi 1er avril, l’annonce, hier, par Israël, de son intention d’occuper une partie du Liban-Sud, une fois la guerre terminée. Les relations au beau fixe entre la France et le Japon, dont l’ambassadeur à Paris est devenu la coqueluche des réseaux sociaux. La sortie, en foot, de l’Italie, qui ne pourra pas participer pour la troisième fois consécutive à la Coupe du monde. Et le projet de la future «bibliothèque Trump» - qui n’est pas un poisson d’avril.

translation.title: Israeli occupation of the South Lebanon: "A New Nakba"
translation.summary: On the front page of the press, this Wednesday, April 1st, Israel announced yesterday its intention to occupy part of the South Lebanon, once the war had ended. The relationship between France and Japan, whose ambassador in Paris has become the pertussis of social networks. Italy's football release, which will not be able to compete for the third time in the World Cup. And the project of the future "Trump Library" - which is not a fish of April.

items.title: Face à l'impétuosité de Trump, Macron vante à Tokyo la "prévisibilité" de l'Europe
items.summary: Au deuxième jour de sa visite au Japon, Emmanuel Macron a souligné la "prévisibilité" de l'Europe, en opposition aux États-Unis de Donald Trump. Devant un parterre de chefs d'entreprise et investisseurs japonais, le président français a également appelé à renforcer les partenariats franco-japonais sans "dépendre de puissances hégémoniques", la Chine et les États-Unis.

translation.title: Faced with Trump's impetuousness, Macron boasts in Tokyo the "previsibility" of Europe
translation.summary: On the second day of his visit to Japan, Emmanuel Macron stressed the "previsibility" of Europe, in opposition to Donald Trump's United States. In front of a party of Japanese entrepreneurs and investors, the French president also called for strengthening Franco-Japanese partnerships without "depending on hegemonic powers", China and the United States.

items.title: Avec un Parti socialiste hésitant, la primaire de la gauche pour 2027 a du plomb dans l’aile
items.summary: Prévue pour le 11 octobre, la primaire de la gauche patine. Alors que ses organisateurs espéraient élargir son périmètre en parvenant à convaincre Raphaël Glucksmann, notamment, d’y participer, sa tenue paraît désormais compromise en raison des hésitations du Parti socialiste. Marine Tondelier compte publier jeudi un "manifeste pour la primaire" pour tenter de la sauver.

translation.title: With a hesitant Socialist Party, the left's primary for 2027 has lead in the wing
translation.summary: Scheduled for October 11, the primary of the left patina. While its organizers hoped to expand its scope by convincing Raphaël Glucksmann, in particular, to participate in it, its outfit now seems to be compromised due to the hesitations of the Socialist Party. Marine Tondelier intends to publish Thursday a "manifest for primary" to try to save her.

items.title: Mondial 2026 : dernier pays qualifié, l'Irak rejoint le groupe de la France
items.summary: Grâce à son succès face à la Bolivie en finale de barrage intercontinental mercredi à Monterrey, l'Irak va disputer pour la deuxième fois seulement un Mondial de football après une première participation en 1986. Les Lions de la Mésopotamie rejoignent la France, le Sénégal et la Norvège dans le groupe I de la compétition organisée aux États-Unis, au Mexique et au Canada..

translation.title: World 2026: Last qualified country, Iraq joins the group of France
translation.summary: Thanks to its success against Bolivia in the intercontinental dam final on Wednesday in Monterrey, Iraq will play for the second time only a World Football Championship after a first participation in 1986. The Lions of Mesopotamia join France, Senegal and Norway in Group I of the competition organized in the United States, Mexico and Canada.

items.title: Téhéran : l'ancienne ambassade américaine visée par une frappe, selon notre correspondant
items.summary: Mercredi matin, plusieurs frappes ont touché différents quartiers de Téhéran, dont celui de l'ancienne ambassade américaine, selon notre correspondant Siavosh Ghazi. Fermé depuis 47 ans, le site, surnommé "nid d'espions" et transformé en musée, aurait été directement visé. "Il s'agit sans doute d'une frappe israélienne, les États-Unis intervenant de moins en moins dans les frappes en Iran", relate Siavosh Ghazi, qui parle d'une frappe "symbolique" dont les motivations restent floues.

translation.title: Tehran: Former US embassy targeted by a strike, according to our correspondent
translation.summary: On Wednesday morning, several strikes hit different parts of Tehran, including that of the former American embassy, according to our correspondent Siavosh Ghazi. Closed for 47 years, the site, nicknamed "nid d'espions" and transformed into a museum, would have been directly targeted. "This is probably an Israeli strike, with the United States becoming less and less involved in the strikes in Iran," says Siavosh Ghazi, who talks about a "symbolic" strike whose motivations remain unclear.

items.title: Donald Trump signe un décret pour encadrer plus strictement le vote par correspondance

items.title: IRGC takes de facto control of Iran government amid deepening power struggle
items.summary: Rising tensions between the Pezeshkian administration and Iran’s military leadership have pushed the president into a “complete political deadlock,” with the Revolutionary Guard effectively assuming control over key state functions, informed sources told Iran International.

items.title: Child recruit’s death shows Iran prioritizing regime survival over civilians
items.summary: The death of 11-year-old Alireza Jafari, the first known child recruit killed during the Iran war, underscores what rights advocates describe as a governing doctrine that places regime survival above civilian protection amid mounting wartime pressure.

items.title: Khameneism after Khamenei- why Mojtaba represents continuity, not change
items.summary: The rise of Mojtaba Khamenei is not an unexpected deviation within the Islamic Republic—it is the logical outcome of a system carefully engineered over nearly four decades by Ali Khamenei.

items.title: Iran’s inflation surges further as consumer prices hit new highs
items.summary: Iran’s official data show inflation accelerating again amid a war with the United States and Israel, with prices more than fivefold higher than in 2021 and food costs rising even faster, hitting poorer and rural households hardest despite signs of monthly easing.

items.title: Leaked IRGC manual shows systematic use of civilian sites as missile cover
items.summary: A leaked internal directive from the IRGC’s missile command appears to show that the use of civilian locations to conceal, support and in some cases facilitate missile launch operations is not ad hoc, but structured, documented and built into operational planning.

items.title: Ghalibaf and Trump escalate rhetoric as prospects for talks remain vague
items.summary: As the war enters its fifth week, tensions between Tehran and Washington are rising, with both sides sending mixed signals over diplomacy and the risk of further escalation.

items.title: Talks with Iran would 'let cancer spread', dissident behind viral video says
items.summary: An Iranian man whose viral plea for Donald Trump’s help drew millions of views says he was forced to flee the country after being targeted by the Revolutionary Guard, warning from exile that negotiating with Tehran would allow its repression to continue.

items.title: Iran’s military uses schools and civilian sites during US-Israeli war
items.summary: Iran’s security and military forces moved personnel, weapons and equipment into at least 70 civilian sites during the US-Israeli airstrikes, an Iran International investigation found, exposing what appears to be a nationwide pattern of using public spaces for military purposes.

items.title: Presence of Iraqi militias in Iran sparks fears of renewed repression
items.summary: Dismay and alarm are spreading among Iranians over reports and images showing Iraqi Popular Mobilization Forces, or Hashd al-Shaabi, inside Iran, with messages sent to Iran International describing fear, anger and a growing sense of insecurity.

items.title: Iran says envoy will stay in Beirut despite Lebanon expulsion order
items.summary: Iran said on Monday its ambassador to Lebanon would remain in Beirut despite a Lebanese order to leave, turning a diplomatic reprimand into a broader test of how far the Lebanese state can push back when its decisions collide with the interests of Tehran and Hezbollah.

items.title: حمله پهپادی جمهوری اسلامی به امارات یک کشته برجا گذاشت
items.summary:
دفتر رسانه‌ای فجیره اعلام کرد یک شهروند بنگلادشی پس از سقوط بقایای یک پهپاد رهگیری‌شده در مزرعه‌ای در شهر فجیره در امارات متحده عربی کشته شده است.

وزارت دفاع امارات متحده عربی روز سه‌شنبه اعلام کرده بود از زمان آغاز جنگ تاکنون ۱۹۷۷ پهپاد و ۴۳۳ موشک بالستیک را رهگیری کرده است.

translation.title: The drone attack of the Islamic Republic killed the UAE.
translation.summary:
A Bangladeshi media office said a Bangladeshi was killed after the fall of the remains of a intercepted drone in a farm in the Arab Emirates.

The United Arab Emirates Defense Ministry announced Tuesday that it had intercepted the drone and 433 ballistic missiles since the war started.

items.title: قیمت نفت پس از آنکه ترامپ گفت جنگ «به‌زودی» پایان می‌یابد، کاهش یافت

items.title: نایب رئیس مجلس: تا زمانی که انتقام خون خامنه‌ای را نگیریم، یقه ترامپ را رها نمی‌کنیم

There will be no negotiations either. >>

translation.title: Israel Army Chief of Staff: We have entered a new stage of battle in Iran and Lebanon

Twenty-two years ago, with the deployment of Xi Jinping, then Secretary-General of Zhejiang Province, the “millions of projects” focusing on the environmental rehabilitation of rural settlements were launched. At that time, Comrade Xi had been the secretary of the Zhejiang province for more than six months and had been working for a long time. Why does he focus on the rehabilitation of the rural habitat environment? At the grass-roots level, Comrade Xi found that while the Zhejiang economy was growing rapidly, the rural areas were faced with “growth problems” and the villages were less than satisfactory. Out of 34,000 villages in the province, only 4,000 have a better habitat. It was described as “a village after a village, which is full of garbage”. And the farmers described it as: “Getting up early and making money, counting it in the trash, spending it in the hospital.” It can be said that the remediation of the habitat environment was an urgent aspiration of the rural population of Zhejiang at the time. Mutual respect, peaceful coexistence and co-operation between China and the United States are beneficial not only to both countries but also to world peace and development. The main elements of the census include agricultural production conditions, food and food production, new quality of agricultural productivity, basics of rural development, living conditions of rural residents, etc. The standard time of the census is 2400 hours on 31 December 2026, and the data for the period is annual 2026. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.

translation.summary:
Over the years, I've compared Donald Trump with Caligula, with an advantage for the last. To say that Trump ("a postmodern version of a late julio-claudius emperor") has gone mad is today a banality. items.title: Trump publica decreto restringindo voto por correio nos EUA
items.summary:
O presidente dos Estados Unidos, Donald Trump, assinou um decreto na tarde desta terça-feira (31) que restringe o voto por correio no país. O republicano critica essa modalidade de votação há anos e, durante a assinatura da medida, voltou a repetir que a fraude pelo correio "é lendária" -ele não apresentou provas que sustentem a afirmação.
Leia mais (03/31/2026 - 20h28)

translation.title: Trump publishes decree restricting mail vote in the US
translation.summary:
The President of the United States, Donald Trump, signed a decree on the afternoon of Tuesday (31) which restricts the vote by mail in the country. The Republican criticizes this type of vote for years and, during the signing of the measure, repeated that mail fraud "is legendary" -he did not provide evidence to support the statement.
Read more (03/31/2026 - 20:28)

items.title: Dois em três americanos dizem querer fim da guerra no Irã mesmo sem objetivos alcançados, afirma pesquisa
items.summary:

translation.title: Two out of three Americans say they want to end the war in Iran even without goals achieved, says research
translation.summary:
Two-thirds of Americans say they believe that the United States must engage to quickly close its engagement in the war in Iran, even if it means not achieving the goals set by the Donald Trump government, according to a research by Reuters/Ipsos released on Tuesday (31).

items.title: Juiz dos EUA bloqueia construção de salão de festas de Trump na Casa Branca
items.summary:
Um juiz dos Estados Unidos bloqueou nesta terça-feira (31) a construção do salão de festas iniciada pelo presidente Donald Trump e avaliada em US$ 400 milhões (cerca de R$ 2 bilhões) na Casa Branca. A medida interrompe, por ora, um dos esforços mais visíveis do republicano para remodelar a sede do poder americano.

translation.title: U.S. judge blocks building Trump's party room in the White House
translation.summary:
A United States judge blocked on Tuesday (31) the construction of the party hall initiated by President Donald Trump and valued at $400 million (about R$ 2 billion) in the White House. The measure interrupts, for now, one of the Republican's most visible efforts to reshape the headquarters of American power.

items.title: Jornalista americana é sequestrada em Bagdá
items.summary:
A jornalista americana Shelly Kittleson foi sequestrada em Bagdá nesta terça-feira (31), segundo o site de notícias do qual ela era colaboradora e dois funcionários da polícia local. Ainda não há informações sobre a identidade dos sequestradores, e nenhum grupo reivindicou a ação.
Leia mais (03/31/2026 - 16h25)

translation.title: American journalist is kidnapped in Baghdad
translation.summary:
The American journalist Shelly Kittleson was kidnapped in Baghdad on Tuesday (31), according to the news site of which she was collaborator and two local police officials. There's still no information on the identity of the kidnappers, and no group claimed the action.
Read more (03/31/2026 - 16h25)
